description: Court record written and signed by Aharon b. Yeshuʿa ha-Rofe. Location: Alexandria. Dated: Middle third of Av 4889 AM, which is July/August 1129 CE, under the authority of Maṣliaḥ Gaʾon. The case concerns half of a ground floor apartment (qāʿa). Also signed by Yiṣḥaq b. Yosef Yerushalmi and Ṣedeq b. [...].
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
